name: sql-mastery-runner
description: Local PostgreSQL runner for the SQL Mastery Path curriculum.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --test dist/test/*.test.js && npm --prefix client test
scripts.test:db: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node dist/scripts/require-db-config.js && node --test dist/test/schema-catalog.test.js dist/test/sideline-manifest.test.js && node dist/scripts/validate-exercises.js
scripts.release-gate: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/require-db-config.js && node --test dist/test/*.test.js && node dist/scripts/validate-exercises.js && npm --prefix client run test --if-present && npm --prefix client run build --if-present
